MUST: SessionRequestForm MUST validate scheduled_date is today or future via clean_scheduled_date() (RF-005)
SessionRequestForm MUST expose only: subject, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, duration, notes (RNF-004)
SessionRequestForm MUST use explicit Meta.fields — MUST NOT use '__all__' (RNF-004)
SessionRequestForm duration MUST only accept values within 60-180 minutes (RF-005)
MUST_NOT: SessionRequestForm MUST NOT allow past dates (RF-005)
SessionRequestForm MUST NOT expose tutor, client, or status fields (RNF-004)

MUST: SessionConfirmationForm MUST expose only meeting_platform and notes fields (RNF-004)
SessionConfirmationForm meeting_platform MUST only accept predefined choices (RF-005)
MUST_NOT: SessionConfirmationForm MUST NOT expose session scheduling fields (RNF-004)

MUST: TutorLeadForm MUST expose only name, email, subject fields (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: TutorLeadForm MUST NOT expose created_at or expiration fields (RNF-004)

MUST: NotificacionExpansionForm MUST expose only email, ciudad_deseada, provincia_deseada (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: NotificacionExpansionForm MUST NOT expose internal metadata fields (RNF-004)
